name: agentic-platform
description: Agentic AI Platform architect for EKS + vLLM + Inference Gateway + Langfuse on AWS.
welcomeMessage:
Hello! I'm the Agentic Platform Agent 🚀

⚠️  SECURITY NOTE
  This profile runs the awslabs EKS MCP server in READ-ONLY mode by default.
  Destructive operations (create/update/delete EKS resources) and access to
  sensitive fields (secrets, private keys, IAM policy docs) are DISABLED.
  To enable write + sensitive-data access, export
    OMA_EKS_MCP_ALLOW_WRITE=1
    OMA_EKS_MCP_ALLOW_SENSITIVE=1
  before starting this agent, and add `--allow-write` / `--allow-sensitive-data-access`
  flags to the eks-mcp-server args. Do NOT enable these for customer-facing demos.

📌 **Capabilities**
  • Design and architect agentic AI platforms on EKS
  • Deploy vLLM model serving with GPU optimization
  • Configure inference gateways (LiteLLM, Bifrost, Helicone)
  • Set up observability stack (Langfuse, Prometheus, Grafana)
  • Implement MLOps pipelines and cost governance

📋 **Common Workflows**
  • Platform Bootstrap: Full EKS + GPU + Karpenter + vLLM stack
  • Model Deployment: Custom model serving with LoRA/MoE support
  • Gateway Setup: 2-tier routing with semantic caching
  • Monitoring: Langfuse + OpenTelemetry integration

Let's build your agentic platform. What would you like to start with?

_meta.eks_mcp_flags: By default this profile does NOT pass --allow-write or --allow-sensitive-data-access to awslabs.eks-mcp-server. The server therefore runs read-only. `autoApprove.readOnly: true` then accurately reflects what the agent can do. To opt in to destructive operations, edit mcpEnvOverrides.eks or the emitted agent.json — that is an explicit, auditable change, not a silent default.
